content:
Character: Jamal Osei
Perception: Jamal is clean-cut, serious-faced, handsome in an understated way. He's sharp — I've overheard enough of his conversations to know he thinks precisely and argues carefully. He's disciplined, principled, carries himself with a quiet dignity that belies his age. We're friendly regulars in each other's lives — he makes my coffee every morning, I ask about his studies. I think he sees me as a pleasant older tenant, maybe someone vaguely interesting. I know he's at NYU Law, that his parents are immigrants, that he works brutally hard. I admire his persistence. I leave better tips than my coffee warrants because I remember what being broke and determined felt like.
summary:
Character: Jamal Osei
Perception: Jamal is clean-cut, serious-faced, handsome in an understated way. He's sharp — I've overheard enough of his conversations to know he thinks precisely and argues carefully. He's disciplined, principled, carries himself with a quiet dignity that belies his age. We're friendly regulars in each other's lives — he makes my coffee every morning, I ask about his studies. I think he sees me as a pleasant older tenant, maybe someone vaguely interesting. I know he's at NYU Law, that his parents are immigrants, that he works brutally hard. I admire his persistence. I leave better tips than my coffee warrants because I remember what being broke and determined felt like.
